message:
feat(runtime): major improvements across runtime, services, and time subsystems

Comprehensive enhancements to core async runtime components.

## Runtime State (+133 lines)
- Add lifecycle state machine with proper transitions
- Implement graceful shutdown coordination
- Add runtime metrics and health indicators
- Better error state handling

## Time/Sleep System (+229 lines refactored)
- Overhaul sleep future implementation for efficiency
- Improve timer wheel hierarchy
- Add deadline coalescing for reduced wakeups
- Better cancellation handling

## HTTP/2 HPACK (+124 lines refactored)
- Improve header compression efficiency
- Add dynamic table size management
- Better huffman encoding paths

## Service Middleware
- Concurrency limit: +100 lines for permit management
- Rate limit: +103 lines for token bucket improvements

## Other Improvements
- cx.rs: +37 lines context propagation
- mutex.rs: +24 lines async mutex refinements
- blocking_pool.rs: +13 lines worker management
- builder.rs: +15 lines configuration options
- config.rs: +5 lines new config fields
- driver.rs: +5 lines timer driver updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
